## 🌤️ Tomorrow's Weather Forecast for Orcas Island, WA (Friday, Feb 20, 2026)

### Temperature
| | |
|---|---|
| **High** | 41°F |
| **Low** | 38°F (Friday night) |

### Sky Conditions
- **Daytime:** Mostly cloudy
- **Night:** Mostly cloudy with chance of rain/snow mix

### Precipitation
| Period | Chance | Type |
|--------|--------|------|
| Friday Day | 10% | -- |
| Friday Night | 30% | Rain showers (10pm-4am), then rain/snow mix |

### Wind Conditions
| Period | Speed | Direction |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| Friday | ~5 mph | SE |
| Friday Night | 3-8 mph | ESE |

**⚠️ Island Travel Outlook:** Light winds tomorrow make for good travel conditions.

### Marine Conditions (San Juan Channel)
| Period | Wind | Waves |
|--------|------|-------|
| Friday | Variable ≤5 kt | 1 ft or less |
| Friday Night | Variable becoming E ~6 kt | 1 ft or less |

**🚢 Conditions are calm and favorable for ferry travel** - no advisories expected for Friday. Today's Small Craft Advisory expires at 10 AM PST.
content:
**🏝️ Orcas Island Forecast – Friday, Feb 20**

**Highs near 41°F**, mostly cloudy. Light SE winds ~5 mph.

**🚢 Ferry Outlook: EXCELLENT** – Calm seas with waves 1 ft or less in San Juan Channel. Today's Small Craft Advisory lifts at 10 AM. Light variable winds make for smooth crossings all day.

**🥾 Outdoor Activities:** Good conditions for hiking and exploring. Dry during the day (only 10% rain chance). Evening brings a chance of rain/snow mix after 10 PM—plan outdoor activities for daytime.

**Bottom line:** Great day to visit the island!
